title: Debiāpur Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Debiāpur with a Z-Score of +4.66. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Debiāpur are characterized by high temperatures and low humidity, with an Umidita of 28% and a Vento of 11.6 km/h. 
 The heat wave has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 15.3 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are likely to be severely impacted by this extreme weather event.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Debiāpur.
